name: Dragon Hills Golf & Country Club
notes: Administratively in Ratchaburi province (Pak Tho district) though marketed under Kanchanaburi / River Kwai region by most golf travel sites. Address: 192 Moo 2, Tambol Anghin, Amphur Paktho, Ratchaburi 70140. Green fees from dragonhillsgolf.com official fee card (560 THB weekday / 750 THB weekend); 1golf.eu confirms same figures. Caddie 300 THB and cart 700 THB from kolfers.com. Caddie/cart mandatory status unclear — listed as à la carte on official fee page but golftripz.com states 'buggy compulsory.' Driving range confirmed (dragonhillsgolf.com). Club rental 500 THB per dragonhillsgolf.com fee card. Shoe rental 100 THB. Site spans ~6,000 rai (1,500 acres) of jungle-clad mountainside. Signature holes 10-12; hole 12 is a downhill par-3 to an island green (~170 yards). Designer: Jim Engh confirmed by 1golf.eu and golflux.com; Isao Aoki cited by some sources as co-designer or architect of companion layout on same property. Year opened: 1994 per golfcards.com; 1989 per 1golf.eu — 1994 used as it is more widely cited. Drive time '1.5 hours from Bangkok' per official site; '90 minutes' consistent with Pak Tho location. GPS coordinates not found. Phone also seen: +66-32-240-504, +66-32-240-505, +66-83-988-0775. Head office Bangkok: +66-2-938-9011. Sources: dragonhillsgolf.com, 1golf.eu, golfcards.com, kolfers.com, golfsavers.com, golflux.com, top100golfcourses.com
